mapper.select: SELECT * FROM like_msg_compensate WHERE status = 1 AND retry_count < max_retry ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{batchSize}
mapper.update:
UPDATE like_msg_compensate SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE like_msg_compensate SET retry_count = #{retryCount}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_msg_compensate WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_msg_compensate WHERE status = 3
